name: gamebet
description: A8 esports aggregator — frontend replica + local backend

scripts.test: npm run test:catalog-smoke && npm run check:rds-schema --prefix apps/backend && npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test:catalog-smoke: node packages/shared/catalog/market_catalog_smoke.test.mjs && node packages/shared/catalog/game_catalog_smoke.test.mjs && node packages/shared/im_parse_smoke.test.mjs && node packages/shared/time/match_time_smoke.test.mjs && node packages/db/paths_smoke.test.mjs
